title: Disability evacuation buddy card
summary: Records access needs before phones, lifts, roads, or transport fail.
content: Disability evacuation buddy card is a practical offline routine for accessibility evacuation. Ask the person what help they want; do not assume needs from appearance. Write mobility, communication, hearing, vision, sensory, medicine, device, battery, and privacy needs. Choose two buddies and one route that does not depend only on elevators. Pack chargers, batteries, documents, repair notes, and device instructions with the person. Practice a calm evacuation when safe and update the card after any change. The goal is to make the action repeatable by a tired person, visible to helpers, and safe enough to stop when official help or a safer option appears.
steps: Ask the person what help they want; do not assume needs from appearance.
Write mobility, communication, hearing, vision, sensory, medicine, device, battery, and privacy needs.
Choose two buddies and one route that does not depend only on elevators.
Pack chargers, batteries, documents, repair notes, and device instructions with the person.
Practice a calm evacuation when safe and update the card after any change.
warnings: Use Disability evacuation buddy card as practical support, not as a replacement for official guidance, trained help, or evacuation when needed.
This is not diagnosis; red flags need professional or emergency help. Treat this as a specific boundary while managing “Disability evacuation buddy card”.
common_mistakes: Starting from memory instead of written notes while carrying out “Disability evacuation buddy card”
Letting one tired person control the whole process while carrying out “Disability evacuation buddy card”
Ignoring the review time while carrying out “Disability evacuation buddy card”
alternatives: Use a wall board when many people are involved as a fallback for “Disability evacuation buddy card”
Use pocket cards when movement is required as a fallback for “Disability evacuation buddy card”
failure_signs: People disagree about the facts, the plan is not being followed, or the situation worsens after the first review during “Disability evacuation buddy card”
when_not_to_use: Do not use Disability evacuation buddy card to delay emergency care, evacuation, fire response, or official instructions.
short_term: Write the first safe action, responsible person, materials, and next review time. This note applies specifically to Disability evacuation buddy card.
long_term: Convert the routine into a repeatable checklist with handover notes and backups. This note applies specifically to Disability evacuation buddy card.
if_method_fails: Reduce complexity, stop unsafe work, and switch to the safest available fallback. This note applies specifically to Disability evacuation buddy card.
environment_notes: Adapt the routine to heat, cold, crowding, darkness, limited water, and local hazards. This note applies specifically to Disability evacuation buddy card.
